name: All In
text:
Push your whole stack to the center: sacrifice all Treasures and tokens you control. Then roll a number of six-sided dice equal to the number of permanents you sacrificed this way.
For each 4, 5, or 6, draw a card and deal 2 damage to any target. For each 1, 2, or 3, lose 2 life and say 'I had a read.' If you sacrificed nothing, you flinch and the table laughs.
flavorText: "Either I walk out of here rich or I walk out of here. Those are the two outcomes. Mostly the second."

extras.dice: roll dice equal to your sacrificed stack
